tool_output_scenarios.description: Best practices tool should return comprehensive Angular/TypeScript coding guidelines
tool_output_scenarios.quality_criteria: The output should contain actionable coding best practices for the Otter framework, covering component creation, code generation patterns, and Angular-specific guidelines.

tool_output_scenarios.description: Create monorepo tool should return instructions with correct repo and app names substituted
tool_output_scenarios.quality_criteria: The output should contain step-by-step instructions for creating a monorepo named 'test-airline-app' with an application named 'booking'. It should not contain any unresolved placeholders like <repositoryName> or <applicationName>.

tool_output_scenarios.description: Create monorepo tool should use default application name 'frontend' when not specified
tool_output_scenarios.quality_criteria: The output should contain instructions referencing 'my-project' as the repository name and 'frontend' as the default application name.

agent_selection_scenarios.input: What are the best practices for creating Otter components?
agent_selection_scenarios.description: Should select get_best_practices for questions about coding standards

agent_selection_scenarios.input: Create a new monorepo called 'airline-booking' with an app called 'web-app'
agent_selection_scenarios.description: Should select create_monorepo_with_app with correct repo and app names

agent_selection_scenarios.input: Set up a new Otter project called my-travel-app
agent_selection_scenarios.description: Should select create_monorepo_with_app for project setup requests

agent_selection_scenarios.input: How do I migrate my Otter project from version 12 to version 14?
agent_selection_scenarios.description: Should select migrate_otter_version for migration questions

agent_selection_scenarios.input: I want to upgrade my Otter installation to the latest version
agent_selection_scenarios.description: Should select migrate_otter_version without a specific target version
Should select get_release_notes_otter for release-related questions

agent_selection_scenarios.input: Which repositories are using the Otter framework?
agent_selection_scenarios.description: Should select get_repositories_using_otter for discovery questions

agent_selection_scenarios.input: What Otter versions are currently supported?
agent_selection_scenarios.description: Should select get_supported_releases for version support questions

agent_selection_scenarios.input: What Angular schematics are available for generating components?
agent_selection_scenarios.description: Should select angular_schematics for schematic discovery requests
Ambiguous query - either release notes or supported releases is acceptable
